title: GST/HST rebate – Eligible travel expenses of an Indian band, a tribal council, or a band-empowered entity - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST rebate – Eligible travel expenses of an Indian band, a tribal council, or a band-empowered entity
Form GST189 – Reason code 8
Reason code 8 provides a rebate of the GST/HST paid on eligible travel expenses of an Indian band, a tribal council, or a band-empowered entity.
Terminology from the Indian Act
The term "Indian" is sometimes used because it has legal meaning in the Indian Act .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
